Wind forcing

Wind forcing#

The wind forcing module is responsible for managing wind data for SWAN simulations. It includes functionalities to download, process, and save wind data from various sources.

class oceanicospy.models.swanpy.preprocess.WindForcing(init, domain_number, wind_info=None, filename=None, share_winds=True, use_link=True)[source]

Bases: object

Parameters:

  • init (object) – An initialization object containing configuration data and folder paths.

  • domain_number (int) – Identifier for the domain being processed.

  • wind_info (dict or None, optional) – Dictionary containing wind information. If None, winds must be provided via filename.

  • filename (str or None, optional) – Path to the file containing wind data. If None, wind must be provided via wind_info.

  • use_link (bool, optional) – If True, creates symbolic links for wind files instead of copying them. Defaults to True.

  • share_winds (bool, optional) – If True, shares wind data across domains. Defaults to True.

__init__(init, domain_number, wind_info=None, filename=None, share_winds=True, use_link=True)[source]
Parameters:

  • init (object) – An initialization object containing configuration data and folder paths.

  • domain_number (int) – Identifier for the domain being processed.

  • wind_info (dict or None, optional) – Dictionary containing wind information. If None, winds must be provided via filename.

  • filename (str or None, optional) – Path to the file containing wind data. If None, wind must be provided via wind_info.

  • use_link (bool, optional) – If True, creates symbolic links for wind files instead of copying them. Defaults to True.

  • share_winds (bool, optional) – If True, shares wind data across domains. Defaults to True.

get_winds_from_ERA5(difference_to_UTC, filename='winds_era5.nc', override=False)[source]

Downloads or verifies the existence of ERA5 wind data for the specified domain. This method checks if the ERA5 wind data NetCDF file exists in the input directory for the current domain. If the file does not exist, it downloads the wind data using the parameters specified in self.wind_info and saves it to the appropriate location. If the file already exists, the download is skipped.

get_winds_from_CMDS(difference_to_UTC, filename='winds_cmds.nc', override=False)[source]

Downloads or verifies the existence of CMDS wind data for the specified domain. This method checks if the CMDS wind data NetCDF file exists in the input directory for the current domain. If the file does not exist, it downloads the wind data using the parameters specified in self.wind_info and saves it to the appropriate location. If the file already exists, the download is skipped.

write_ERA5_ascii(era5_filename, ascii_filename)[source]

Converts ERA5 wind data from NetCDF to ASCII format and manages file/link placement for SWAN model input. Depending on the configuration, this method processes the ERA5 NetCDF wind file, converts it to ASCII format, and ensures the resulting file is correctly placed or linked in the appropriate domain directory for model runs. It also updates wind information metadata if available. :param era5_filename: Path to the input ERA5 NetCDF wind file. :type era5_filename: str :param ascii_filename: Name of the output ASCII file to be generated or linked. :type ascii_filename: str

Returns:

Updated wind information dictionary if self.wind_info is not None, otherwise None.

Return type:

dict or None

write_CMDS_ascii(cdms_filename, ascii_filename)[source]

Converts CMDS wind data from NetCDF to ASCII format and manages file/link placement for SWAN model input. Depending on the configuration, this method processes the CMDS NetCDF wind file, converts it to ASCII format, and ensures the resulting file is correctly placed or linked in the appropriate domain directory for model runs. It also updates wind information metadata if available. :param cdms_filename: Path to the input CMDS NetCDF wind file. :type cdms_filename: str :param ascii_filename: Name of the output ASCII file to be generated or linked. :type ascii_filename: str

Returns:

Updated wind information dictionary if self.wind_info is not None, otherwise None.

Return type:

dict or None

fill_wind_section(dict_wind_data)[source]

Replaces and updates the .swn file with the wind configuration for a specific domain.
